segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic-style classroom or study hall with high vaulted ceilings. Students are seated at long wooden desks on both sides of a central aisle covered by an ornate blue rug. Natural light streams through tall windows at the far end, illuminating the stone walls decorated with tapestries and shields. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the serene atmosphere of the medieval academic setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a medieval gothic study hall that maintains a serene and scholarly atmosphere. It begins by capturing the high vaulted ceilings and stone walls adorned with tapestries and shields. The perspective focuses on students seated at long wooden desks that flank a central aisle, which is covered by an ornate blue rug. Natural light streams through tall windows at the far end of the room, illuminating the space and emphasizing the stillness of the academic setting.
